tickets.subject: I was charged twice for one order
tickets.message: I placed one order yesterday but my card shows two charges. One is completed and the other is pending. Please refund me now.

tickets.subject: Cannot log in after resetting password
tickets.message: I changed my password this morning. Now every login attempt says invalid credentials although the reset link worked.

tickets.subject: Where can I download invoice PDFs?
tickets.message: I need invoices for the last three months for accounting. I cannot find the download option in the dashboard.
